allowMenuOnDisabled.description: Allows menu to be opened if button is disabled.

clickMode.description: Defines which mode button will work in

listActions.description: setter for list actions as view element config

mode.description: Lookup mode (List or Selection Window). List by default.

showSecondaryDisplayValue.description: Shows secondary display value in list.

showValueAsLink.description: State of show value as link.

sortFilteringFn.description: Function for sorting items when filtering.

useStaticFiltering.description: Sets state of using static filtering.

valueChange.description: Emits an event every time the value of the control changes.

type.description: Discriminator. Always equals the component's componentType. Emit values.type = componentType verbatim; ignore any per-component overrides.

templateValuesMapping.description: Possibility to link custom name with data item model column name.
